crime.value: Planned assassination/murder of Princess Jetlyn on her sixteenth birthday
crime.quote: On her birthday is when we will take care of her for once and all

victim.value: Princess Jetlyn, targeted because her beauty makes her more beloved than the jealous Queen
victim.quote: The only reason the Queen didn't like Jetlyn was because the Princess's beauty was the fairest

closed_world.value: Royal court/palace setting with limited access during formal events
closed_world.quote: They go into a private room that no one knows about

culprit_and_motive.value: Evil stepmother Queen Sylvia, motivated by jealousy of Jetlyn's beauty and popularity

suspect_architecture.value: Evil stepmother Queen Sylvia with clear motive (jealousy of Princess's beauty), two loyal guards as accomplices
suspect_architecture.quote: The only reason the Queen didn't like Jetlyn was because the Princess's beauty was the fairest of the town

clue_fairness.value: Secret room and assassination plot revealed to reader immediately when discovered
clue_fairness.quote: They go into a private room that no one knows about. 'On her birthday is when we will take care of her'

social_world.value: Royal hierarchy with King, evil stepmother Queen, Princess, and loyal guards serving Queen's orders
social_world.quote: 'As you wish, my highness,' one of the guards say as they both bow

alibi.value: Queen disappears during ball festivities when everyone is distracted by the Princess
alibi.quote: The Queen dissapears from the room not that anyone notice they are too busy looking at the princess

media_and_audience.value: Public adoration of Princess creates cover for Queen's jealousy-driven plot
media_and_audience.quote: Everyone adored her to death and would protect her with their lifes. Sylvia was so jealous!
